generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance CartMotorController : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval controller for the horizontal (cart) stepper motor in the lab-scale gantry crane system"
]

instance CartMotor : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Stepper motor driving horizontal movement of the gantry crane's cart"
]

instance HoistMotorController : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval controller for the vertical (hoist) stepper motor in the lab-scale gantry crane system"
]

instance HoistMotor : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Stepper motor driving vertical movement of the gantry crane's hoist assembly"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder measuring the hoist's swinging angle for motion tracking in the lab-scale gantry crane system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleMeasurement
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Wind speed sensor interfaced with Arduino for environmental monitoring in the crane operation"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedMeasurement
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnetic pickup device for container handling in the crane system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ContainerPickupStatus
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance SwingAngleMeasurement : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedMeasurement : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance ContainerPickupStatus : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Electromagnet
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CartMotorController, HoistMotorController
]

instance OperationalParameters : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ArduinoInterface
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Mathematical model of the gantry crane's kinematics used for optimal trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantryLib
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Digital simulation of the crane's physical behavior for validation against real-time data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantryLib
]

instance CADCraneFrame : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion 360 CAD model of the gantry crane frame used for spatial reference"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantryLib
]

instance RealTimeTrajectoryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Current trajectory execution data logged in real-time for validation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance HistoricalTrajectoryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Historical trajectory execution data stored for trend analysis and predictive maintenance"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance OperationalMetrics : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Performance metrics including position, velocity, acceleration, and operational parameters"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateData, OperationalParameters
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

// C11: Enablers
instance PythonGantryLib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Open-source Python module encapsulating core digital twin services (trajectory generation, validation, simulation)"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryOptimizationService, ContinuousValidationService, SimulationService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database (PostgreSQL-based) for continuous logging of operational metrics and trajectory data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeTrajectoryData, HistoricalTrajectoryData, OperationalMetrics
]

instance EclipseMosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker facilitating real-time service communication between digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryOptimizationService, ContinuousValidationService, DashboardIntegrationService
]

instance GrafanaDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization dashboard for real-time and historical trajectory data with confidence bounds"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeTrajectoryData, HistoricalTrajectoryData
]

instance DockerContainerization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Container orchestration using Docker Compose for deployment of database, MQTT broker, and dashboard services"
    DTDFVocab:enables TimescaleDB, EclipseMosquitto, GrafanaDashboard
]

instance ArduinoInterface : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Arduino Uno interfacing with sensors (electromagnet, swing encoder, anemometer) and motor controllers"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SwingAngleMeasurement, WindSpeedMeasurement, ContainerPickupStatus, OperationalParameters
]

// C6: Services
instance TrajectoryOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service using kinematic models to generate optimal paths minimizing residual swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time validation comparing simulated trajectories with physical sensor data, triggering alerts for threshold breaches"
    DTDFVocab:provides AnomalyDetectionInsight, OperationalAlertAction
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Digital simulation replicating physical crane behavior for comparison with real-time data"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationValidationInsight
]

instance HistoricalAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Trend analysis service using TimescaleDB for predictive maintenance and historical performance evaluation"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrendAnalysisInsight
]

instance DashboardIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service connecting digital twin data to Grafana dashboard for real-time visualization"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing mathematically optimal path with minimal residual swinging motion for crane operations"
]

instance AnomalyDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Time-series classification identifying anomalies (e.g., motor faults) in real-time operational data"
]

instance OperationalAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic dashboard-triggered action for threshold breaches requiring manual intervention"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TrendAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical trend analysis enabling predictive maintenance based on operational metrics"
]

instance SimulationValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comparison between simulated and real-time data validating model fidelity"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time and historical trajectory visualization with confidence bounds in Grafana dashboard"
]

// C1: Environment
instance CraneLabEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains CartMotorController, HoistMotorController, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, Electromagnet,
                 PythonGantryLib, TimescaleDB, EclipseMosquitto, GrafanaDashboard, ArduinoInterface
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interaction is implemented through the **Trajectory Generator Service**, which produces optimal movement trajectories based on a kinematic model. These trajectories are sent to the physical system via the **Control Application (Python)**, which directly interfaces with the crane’s controllers. The **Continuous Validation Service** provides feedback to the operator (via dashboard notifications) rather than directly to the physical system."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates on a continuous time scale with real-time data logging and validation. The Logging Application continuously logs crane state data, while the Continuous Validation Service operates in near real-time to compare measurements with simulations. The frequency of data updates is not explicitly quantified in the documents, but the system is designed for continuous operation and validation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital twin constellation is structured as:
  - **Physical Crane (PT)**: Central hardware component (frame, motors, controllers, sensors).
  - **Physical Crane Interface (Python)**: Acts as a bridge between PT and DT.
  - **Control Application (Python)**: Executes commands from DT to PT.
  - **DT Services (Six Containers)**:
    1. Database (TimescaleDB) – Stores data.
    2. Dashboard (Grafana) – Visualizes data.
    3. Trajectory Generator Service – Computes optimal paths.
    4. Simulation Service – Simulates crane behavior.
    5. Continuous Validation Service – Compares real vs. simulated data.
    6. MQTT Broker (Eclipse Mosquitto) – Facilitates inter-service communication.
  Orchestration is centralized via Docker Compose for deployment."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin covers the following lifecycle stages of its physical counterpart:
  - **As Designed**: Represented by the **CAD models** (Autodesk Fusion360) and **kinematic models** used for trajectory generation.
  - **As Manufactured**: Represented by the **physical crane hardware** (frame, motors, controllers, Arduino, sensors) and the **Arcadia models** (Capella) for system engineering validation.
  - **As Operated**: Represented by the **Continuous Validation Service**, which validates operational trajectories against simulations during runtime."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Verification**: Kinematic models validated against physical behavior via simulation.
  - **Validation**: Continuous validation compares real-time sensor data with simulations, using distance metrics and threshold-based alerts.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: Confidence bounds (visualized in Grafana) account for simulation/model discrepancies.
  - **Error Mitigation**: Time-series classification techniques (e.g., fault detection) identify anomalies in operational data."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin uses the following technical connections:
  - **MQTT Broker (Eclipse Mosquitto)**: Facilitates real-time signaling between services (Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Continuous Validation).
  - **SQL Queries**: Used for accessing TimescaleDB (PostgreSQL-based) to retrieve and log time-series data.
  - **Python APIs**: Core services (Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Continuous Validation) are implemented as Python modules and interact with the physical system via the Physical Crane Interface."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The digital twin is hosted/deployed on:
  - **Single-Personal-Computer Setup**: All services (Python containers, database, MQTT broker, dashboard) run on a single machine via Docker Compose.
  - **First-Time Setup**: Automated initialization of TimescaleDB, Grafana, and MQTT broker via Docker Compose scripts.
  - **Scalability**: Services can be extended by adding new Python modules (gantrylib) or Docker containers."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration is **not explicitly detailed** in the documents. No external systems (e.g., other digital twins, enterprise databases) are mentioned for interoperability."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership is **not explicitly stated** in the documents. The exemplar uses open-source tools (TimescaleDB, Grafana, Mosquitto), implying potential public access to logged data. Privacy is not addressed beyond the open-source license (MIT)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The exemplar follows **ad-hoc standards**:
  - **Digital Twin Framework**: No commercial or open-source DT framework (e.g., Eclipse Ditto/BaSyx) is used; services are implemented independently.
  - **Protocols**: MQTT for messaging, SQL for database queries.
  - **Models**: CAD (Autodesk Fusion 360) and Capella (Model-Based Systems Engineering) for representation."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The document does not provide explicit details on security or safety considerations. The Human Machine Interface (dashboard) allows operators to control the crane, but there is no mention of emergency stop mechanisms, encryption protocols, or cybersecurity measures for remote operation. Future work may address these aspects."
]
